pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script directly creates and populates this directory within the Wazuh manager container.
task description and verifier.py explicitly require this custom correlation rule ID.
task description requires triggering on rule 553, and external web search confirms Wazuh default rule 553 is 'File deleted'.
task description explicitly sets the threshold to 5 files, enforced by verifier.py logic.
task description sets the time window to 45 seconds, enforced by verifier.py logic.
task description maps the rule to MITRE ATT&CK T1485, and external documentation confirms T1485 is 'Data Destruction'.
task description requires generating a level 12 alert, which is enforced by verifier.py checking for level >= 12.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target directory '/var/ossec/data/financial_records' is synthetically generated and populated with dummy files via setup_task.sh. Verified that the custom Wazuh rule requirements match the task instructions: rule ID 100250, alert level 12, frequency of 5, timeframe of 45 seconds, and mapping to MITRE ATT&CK T1485. Additionally, confirmed via external documentation that MITRE T1485 correctly maps to 'Data Destruction' and the required parent SID 553 corresponds to the default Wazuh 'File deleted' rule.
